languages.text: "Представитель рода Гапрак убит вместе со своими людьми. Это дело рук... Эланы?"
"A member of House Gaprak has been killed along with his men. Was this the work of... Elana?"
languages.original_text: "Представитель рода Гапрак убит вместе со своими людьми. Это дело рук... Эланы?"

traits.locale_text: "A member of House Gaprak has been killed along with his men. Was this the work of... Elana?"

languages.text: «Han asesinado a un miembro de la casa Gaprak junto a sus hombres. ¿Ha sido obra de... Elana?».
languages.original_text: "A member of House Gaprak has been killed along with his men. Was this the work of... Elana?"

traits.locale_text: «Han asesinado a un miembro de la casa Gaprak junto a sus hombres. ¿Ha sido obra de... Elana?».

languages.text: “贾帕克家族的一名成员和他的手下全都被干掉了。这是……‘埃拉娜’干的吗？”
languages.original_text: "A member of House Gaprak has been killed along with his men. Was this the work of... Elana?"

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家族的一名成员和他的手下全都被干掉了。这是……‘埃拉娜’干的吗？”

languages.text: « Un membre de la maison Gaprak a été tué avec ses hommes. Est-ce l'œuvre de la dénommée... Elana ? »

languages.text: "Gaprak Hanesi'nin bir mensubu, adamlarıyla birlikte öldürüldü. Bu... Elana'nın işi miydi?"

languages.text: "Ein Mitglied von Haus Gaprak wurde mit allen seinen Männern getötet. War das das Werk von ... Elana?"

languages.text: 「ギャプラク家の家臣が殺された。これはエラーナの仕業か？」
languages.original_text: "A member of House Gaprak has been killed along with his men. Was this the work of... Elana?"
